name: Quenching Oil Residue Removal Dataset
description: Comprehensive contamination dataset for Quenching Oil Residue. Includes chemical composition, safety metrics, PPE requirements, and laser removal parameters for effective contamination removal.

measurementTechnique: Laser contamination removal analysis, safety assessment, chemical characterization

includedInDataCatalog.name: Z-Beam Contamination Removal Database
includedInDataCatalog.description: Comprehensive database of contamination removal parameters, safety data, and laser cleaning specifications

contaminant.name: Quenching Oil Residue
contaminant.description: During quenching process, oil contaminates steel surfaces because heat treatment causes carbonization, so deposits form hard layers that differ from rust by their oily residue and adhesion strength. On tool steel, contamination spreads unevenly and resists solvents, while on steel it bonds tightly during cooling, creating removal challenges like surface damage from mechanical methods. Laser cleaning works effectively so pulses vaporize deposits without harming substrate, and process achieves clean results after short exposure.

fireExplosionRisk.description: Combustible materials present, risk elevated in confined spaces or high-power settings
fireExplosionRisk.mitigation: Fire extinguisher accessible, adequate ventilation, monitor substrate temperature

toxicGasRisk.description: Multiple toxic compounds detected: Acrolein, Formaldehyde, Carbon Monoxide - requires enhanced protection
toxicGasRisk.mitigation: Half-face or full-face respirator with organic vapor/particulate cartridges, adequate ventilation. WARNING: Formaldehyde, Polycyclic Aromatic Hydrocarbons (PAHs) - known carcinogen(s), minimize exposure

visibilityHazard.description: Moderate visibility reduction (40-60%), significant particulate haze
visibilityHazard.mitigation: Ensure clear sight lines, use source extraction, maintain awareness of surroundings

ventilationRequirements.rationale: Standard industrial ventilation (12 ACH) for particulate control
